title: UDBG_Machine
text: UDBG_Machine Specifies the host identifier of the machine where the Uniface Debugger is located. UDBG_Machine = localhost | HostID For example: udbg_machine=localhost or udbg_machine=127.0.0.1 Arguments HostID is the network node name for the machine, for example AMS093606.uniface.emea or 127.0.0.1 . Default value: localhost File section: [install] Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
